spec.name: Sound Bind Ring
spec.summary: Anchors sound sonic flux as a ring perimeter at self reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Anchors sound sonic flux as a ring perimeter at self reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions. A square bind/affect recipe that channels sound discipline into sonic output. It applies a ring pattern against object across self reach with immediate persistence.
